test: Alpha Slime hits for 35 with heavy_strike
zone_01_boss:
Alpha Slime (boss): STR 32, DEF 4, 75 HP. Has iron_blade equipped.
heavy_strike: ~35 damage to Lv2 Einherjar (DEF 10). Used ~80% of the time.
basic_attack: ~16 damage. Used ~20% of the time.
Retaliate deals 8 damage back per hit.
CRITICAL: Survive cancels your primary action. Only retaliate fires. DPS halves.
STRATEGY: Buy 2-3 minor_potions (30g each). Use them MID-COMBAT to sustain.
Go Normal every round (16 damage/round = 5 rounds to kill). Potion when HP drops below 40.
Don't over-invest in Survive — the DPS loss means you can't kill fast enough.
zone_01_economy:
Zone 1 gives ~60-77g before boss across 4 encounters.
Minor Potion: 30g, heals 50 HP. THE key resource for zone 1.
Buy potions, not weapons (100g+ — can't afford).
Fodder slimes: 36 HP each, deal 3 dmg at Lv1, 1 dmg at Lv2. Trivial after level-up.
Level-up happens around encounter 3 (Lv1 -> Lv2). Stats double. Fodder becomes free.
Save all gold for potions. Target: 2-3 potions before boss.
zone_01_cleared:
Zone 1 cleared on run 3 (seed 77). Key factors:
- Mid-combat potions are essential for the boss fight
- Got lucky with 2 basic_attack rolls on boss rounds 2 and 4 (saved 38 damage total)
- Boss dropped Potion (150 HP) and Iron Blade — huge rewards
- Iron Blade boosted STR from 10 to 40 at Lv2
- Total gold earned before boss: 68g. Bought 2 potions (60g). Used 1 pre-combat, 1 mid-combat.
- Entered boss at 81 HP, won at 13 HP. Very tight.
cheat_debt_warning:
CHEAT DEBT IS DANGEROUS. Spending 2 AP on Cheat against the zone 1 boss resulted in death even after potioning to 81 HP. The boss hit likely did 35 + significant debt bonus, potentially 50-70+ total damage. 
DO NOT Cheat against bosses unless you can kill them on your turn before they act.
Stick to Normal attacks + potion heal rounds for sustained fights.
zone_01_hp_management:
NO FREE HEALS between zones. HP from fodder fights is lost permanently.
Zone 1 fodder costs:
- Enc 1 (1 slime): 9 HP at Lv1
- Enc 2 (2 slimes): 30 HP at Lv1
- Enc 3 (2 slimes): 30 HP at Lv1
- Enc 4 (3 slimes): 12 HP at Lv2 (trivial after level-up)
Total pre-boss HP loss: ~81 HP across 4 encounters at Lv1, ~12 at Lv2.

KEY INSIGHT: Don't waste potions on fodder. Every potion used before the boss is one you don't have FOR the boss. 
Go into encounter 4 at low HP — Lv2 slimes only do 1 dmg each, you'll survive.
Save ALL gold for boss potions. Target: 2 potions minimum (60g).
Zone gives ~65-77g total. Can afford 2 potions if you don't spend on pre-boss healing.
zone_01_final_analysis:
Zone 1 boss (Alpha Slime) is a HARD skill check for solo naked Einherjar.
Best achievable state before boss: ~27-35 HP at Lv2, ~78g (3 potions worth).
With 3 potions + Survive fodder strat: 177 effective HP.
Boss needs 6 rounds to kill. Expected damage taken over 6 rounds: ~187.
177 < 187 = statistically net-negative. Need lucky basic_attack rolls to survive.

Run 6 (seed 222): potions worked correctly, healed mid-combat, saved HP through fodder.
Came down to 20% coin flip on final round. Lost.

The fight is POSSIBLE but requires ~2 basic_attack rolls in 6 rounds (expected 1.2).
About 30-40% overall win rate with perfect play. This feels intentional as a skill check.
correct_strategy:
THE SURVIVE/CHEAT RHYTHM (from designer):

FODDER: Survive all rounds. On the LAST round when enemies are low enough, Cheat to kill them all on YOUR turn before they hit you. Saves the final round of chip damage.

BOSS — the interleave cycle:
1. Survive (bank AP, half damage, retaliate chips)
2. Normal (full attack + retaliate)  
3. Survive (bank AP, half damage)
4. When HP low → Cheat: potion as primary + basic_attack as extra (heal AND attack in one turn)
5. Survive NEXT round to absorb debt-boosted hit at half damage
6. Repeat from step 2

The key: Survive AFTER Cheat cleans up the debt. Average damage per round drops from ~31 to ~26. Over 6-7 rounds that's 30+ HP saved = one extra potion worth.

Cheat is a FINISHER for fodder, a POTION ENABLER for bosses. Never raw-Cheat a boss for pure burst.
zone_01_victory_proper:
Zone 1 cleared PROPERLY on run 7 (seed 333). No free heals, items cost turns.

STRATEGY THAT WORKS:
- Fodder: Survive all rounds, Cheat-finish when all enemies in kill range. Saves ~5 HP per fight.
- Boss: Survive/Normal interleave. Cheat 1 for potion+attack combos when HP low. Survive after Cheat to absorb debt.
- Rhythm: Survive → Normal → Survive → Cheat(potion+attack) → Survive → Cheat(potion+attack) → Normal finish.

NUMBERS:
- Entered boss at 81 HP with 3 potions (150 HP healing).
- Boss took 7 rounds. Heavy_strike hit 5 times, basic_attack 1 time.
- Used 2 potions mid-combat (Cheat combos). Finished at 44 HP with 1 potion spare.
- Total fodder HP loss: 34 (vs ~81 going all-Normal at Lv1). Survive strat saves ~47 HP.
- Gold earned: 90g before boss. Bought 3 potions + 1 free drop = 4 total. Used 1 pre-boss, 2 mid-combat.

Boss dropped Iron Blade + Minor Potion. Equip the blade for zone 2.
zone_08_kitsune_threat:
Zone 8 Caster Kitsune: MAG 106, bolt does 84 magic damage (ignores DEF). 
Dies in 2 rounds (169 HP, low DEF 9). ALWAYS kill first.
At boss 1.5x scaling: MAG ~150+, bolt could do 115+. With Oni keeping me busy, Kitsune could fire 3-4 bolts = 350-460 magic damage. That's lethal.

Boss strategy: MUST kill Kitsune first even though Oni is the "boss". Every round Kitsune lives costs ~115 HP. 2 rounds max to kill it, then solo Oni.

Target priority: Kitsune > Tanuki (healer) > everything else.
zone_08_progress:
Zone 8 run (seed 333). At encounter 6/7 when StatusEffect bug hit.
Party: Kael Lv15 (Einherjar, STR 183, DEF 170) + Martyr Recruit Lv8 (DEF 100).
Kael has: iron_blade, iron_guard, gale_brace, leech_fang.
Martyr has: iron_blade, iron_guard.
Stash: minor_potion x2, potion x3, void_fang.
Gold: 2546.

Key findings: physical enemies do 1-18 damage. Only Kitsune bolt (84 magic dmg) is a threat.
Boss is Brute Oni + Caster Kitsune at 1.5x. Strategy: Martyr taunts, Kael kills Kitsune first.

Void Fang: DEGENERATE scaling, needs base STR ~140+ to be positive. Worth 3200g sell.
Leech Fang: 15% life steal, good on Kael.
Fracture: unlocked at Lv15, SHATTER reduces DEF 25% for 2t — use on armored Oni bosses.
zone_08_boss_victory:
Zone 8 boss: Brute Oni (544 HP, DEF 116, STR 130) + Caster Kitsune (241 HP, MAG 148, bolt = 113 dmg).

STRATEGY: Kill Kitsune first (2 rounds of thrust). Kitsune targets lowest_def = Martyr, so retaliate doesn't trigger on it. Martyr absorbs the bolts. After Kitsune dies, grind down the Oni with thrust. Fracture every 3 rounds to keep SHATTER active (+8 damage per thrust).

KEY: Leech Fang + retaliate = full self-heal against physical enemies. Kael ended at 100% HP. Only magic bypasses the DEF+leech combo.

Martyr's role: soak magic damage (she has more raw HP to burn), taunt on cooldown to redirect Oni, brace_strike for DEF buff when taunt is down. She needs potions to survive 2+ Kitsune bolts.

11 rounds total. Used 1 Potion on Martyr mid-fight. Comfortable win.
onmyoji_zone01_analysis:
Onmyoji zone 1 run 1 (died enc 4/5):

BOLT: 13 dmg Lv1, 17 dmg Lv2. Ignores DEF. 3 hits to kill fodder slime (36 HP).
FODDER hits: 5 Normal / 2 Survive. No visible Cheat debt at this level.
PARTIAL ACTIONS: SPD 3=0 slots, SPD 6=0 slots. Foresight unusable early.

OPTIMAL FODDER PATTERN: Survive/Survive/Cheat triple-bolt = instant kill, only 4 damage from 1 slime.
Multi-slime: triple-bolt kills one, Survive/Survive/triple-bolt the next.

PROBLEM: Enc 4 (3 slimes) needs ~43+ HP. Zone gives ~47g from encs 1-3, affords 1 potion.
Even with perfect play + 1 potion, can't survive enc 4 (3 slimes = 6 Survive dmg/round, ~12 rounds needed).

BOSS: heavy_strike ~37 damage. ONE-SHOTS onmyoji from full (43 HP at Lv2).
Need multiple potions AND Survive rhythm to beat boss. Seems impossible without better gear/levels.

CORE ISSUE: No passive damage (no retaliate). Survive = zero DPS. Can't trade vs groups.
onmyoji_zone01_math:
ZONE 1 ONMYOJI SURVIVABILITY MATH:

Enc 4 (3 slimes) is the wall. At Lv2 (43 max HP, bolt=17, 3-hit kills):
- Triple-bolt kill cycle: Survive/Survive/Cheat = 2S+1C per slime
- Damage to kill s0: 6+6+15=27. To kill s1: 4+4+10=18. Total: 45 > 43 max HP.
- CANNOT survive enc 4 even from full HP at Lv2.

AT LV3 (49 HP, bolt=20, 2-hit kills): enc 4 becomes survivable.
Kill cycle: Survive/Cheat double-bolt = 1S+1C. Much faster.
But can't reach Lv3 before enc 4 in zone 1.

POTION MATH: Need 2 potions carried INTO enc 4 combat.
Use Cheat(potion + 2xbolt) combo — heals AND damages in one action.
Zone gives ~47g from encs 1-3. Affords 1 potion. Need 1 lucky drop for 2nd.

ALTERNATIVE: If Lv3 reachable from grinding (re-enter zone?), 2-bolt kills change everything.
onmyoji_zone01_verdict:
ONMYOJI ZONE 1 VERDICT: Cannot reliably solo zone 1. Tested 2 runs with optimal play.

Run 1 (random seed): Died enc 4/5 at Lv2. Got through encs 1-3 using 1 potion.
Run 2 (seed 42): Died enc 3/5 at Lv1. Got 25g from encs 1-2, needed 30g for potion.

THE WALL: Encounter 4 (3 slimes) is mathematically impossible at Lv2.
- Triple-bolt kill cycle: 2 Survive + 1 Cheat = 3 rounds per kill.
- 3 kills = 9 rounds minimum. Damage taken: ~27 (kill s0) + 18 (kill s1) + ~6 (kill s2) = 51 damage.
- Max HP at Lv2: 43. Even from full HP, 51 > 43.

ROOT CAUSE: No passive damage (no retaliate), single-target bolt only, low HP/DEF.
Survive = zero DPS. Every kill costs 3 full rounds. Groups scale linearly in difficulty.

WHAT WOULD FIX IT: AoE bolt, higher bolt damage at Lv1 (2-hit kills instead of 3), 
or more gold/potions from early encounters.
berserker_zone01_verdict:
BERSERKER ZONE 1 VERDICT: Strictly worse than onmyoji. Died enc 2/5.

STATS: Lv1: 30 HP (lowest!), STR 5, DEF 1, SPD 7. Only basic_attack until Lv3.
FRENZY: x1(1.0), x2(1.1), x3(1.3). Modest scaling. Triple-attack = 6+6+7 = 19 total.
AP CAPS AT 3: max 4 attacks per Cheat (primary + 3 extras). Did not see frenzy x4.

COMPARISON TO ONMYOJI:
- Burst per cycle: 19 (berserker triple) vs 39 (onmyoji triple-bolt). HALF the damage.
- Cycles to kill slime: 2 (berserker) vs 1 (onmyoji). Double the rounds.
- HP: 30 (berserker) vs 36 (onmyoji). Less survivability.
- Phys damage reduced by DEF. Magic ignores DEF. Onmyoji advantage vs armor.

POTION COMBO: Cheat use_item(potion) + 3 extras works. Frenzy counts from first 
attack extra, not the potion (3 consecutive, not 4).

CONCLUSION: Berserker needs Lv3+ (quick_strike) or party support to function.
Zone 1 encounter 2 (2 slimes) is the death point — not even enc 4 like onmyoji.
